---
title: "CGE Chile - 6 Sectores - Calibración 2022"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(gEcon)
library(pracma)
rm(list = ls())
# setwd("../") # Es preferible usar rutas relativas desde la ubicación del script o el .Rproj
```

## 1. Procesamiento de la SAM 2022

```{r sam_load}
chile_sam_raw <- read.csv("../data/sam_2022_6sect_sinmg.csv", check.names = FALSE, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

# Clean names and data
colnames(chile_sam_raw) <- trimws(colnames(chile_sam_raw))
chile_sam_raw[, 1] <- trimws(chile_sam_raw[, 1])

chile_sam <- chile_sam_raw
for (i in 2:ncol(chile_sam)) {
    chile_sam[[i]] <- as.numeric(as.character(chile_sam[[i]]))
}
rownames(chile_sam) <- chile_sam_raw[, 1]
chile_sam <- chile_sam[, -1]
chile_sam[is.na(chile_sam)] <- 0

# Define names
s_names <- paste0("Act_", c("Agri", "Min", "Manu", "elect_agua_gas", "const", "serv"))
p_names <- paste0("prod_", c("Agri", "Min", "Manu", "elect_agua_gas", "const", "serv"))
pmc_names <- p_names

# Verification
missing_cols <- s_names[!s_names %in% colnames(chile_sam)]
if (length(missing_cols) > 0) {
    stop(paste("Error: columnas faltantes:", paste(missing_cols, collapse = ", ")))
}

# --- FIX 5: Keep X_matrix diagonal (don't zero it). CD calibration absorbs own-product use. ---
X_matrix <- as.matrix(chile_sam[p_names, s_names])
make_matrix <- as.matrix(chile_sam[s_names, p_names])

pad_floor <- 1e-12
V_sector_vals <- pmax(rowSums(make_matrix), 0.1)

# Extract SAM components
D_m <- as.numeric(chile_sam[p_names, "Hogares"])
G_m <- as.numeric(chile_sam[p_names, "Gobierno"])
I_m <- as.numeric(chile_sam[p_names, "S-I"])
V_m <- as.numeric(chile_sam[p_names, "Var_Exis"])
M_m <- as.numeric(chile_sam["row", p_names])
E_m <- as.numeric(chile_sam[p_names, "row"])

# VAT/Tariff rates: GCN base = D + X + G + I + V where D is at purchaser prices (D=D_m)
# Since D=D_m in this formulation, the base is simply domestic_abs
X_sum <- rowSums(X_matrix)
IVA_m <- as.numeric(chile_sam["IVA", p_names])
Ar_m <- as.numeric(chile_sam["Arancel", p_names])
domestic_abs <- D_m + X_sum + G_m + I_m + V_m
domestic_abs_safe <- pmax(domestic_abs, 1.0)
vat_r <- IVA_m / domestic_abs_safe
tar_r <- Ar_m / pmax(M_m, 1e-6)

# D at purchaser prices (D = D_m in GCN Market Clearing)
D_v <- D_m  # raw SAM values; non-consumed products (Min, const) stay at 0

L_vals <- as.numeric(chile_sam["Trabajo", s_names])
K_vals <- as.numeric(chile_sam["Capital", s_names])
L_vals <- pmax(L_vals, 0.1)
K_vals <- pmax(K_vals, 0.1)

Kh_val <- chile_sam["Hogares", "Capital"]
Lh_val <- chile_sam["Hogares", "Trabajo"]
Kf_val <- chile_sam["Empresas", "Capital"]
Kg_val <- chile_sam["Gobierno", "Capital"]

# Revenue at p=1 = total activity output
revenue_vals <- as.numeric(colSums(t(make_matrix)))

t_pro_r <- as.numeric(chile_sam["Imp_prod", s_names]) / (revenue_vals + pad_floor)
t_esp_r <- if ("Imptos_Espec" %in% rownames(chile_sam)) as.numeric(chile_sam["Imptos_Espec", s_names]) / (revenue_vals + pad_floor) else rep(0, 6)

net_rev <- revenue_vals * (1 - t_pro_r - t_esp_r)

# Factor shares for Cobb-Douglas
bk <- K_vals / (net_rev + pad_floor)
bl <- L_vals / (net_rev + pad_floor)
bx <- sweep(X_matrix, 2, net_rev + pad_floor, "/")

# SA sectors: Act_Agri(1), Act_Manu(3), Act_EAG(4) use 5 products (no prod_const=5)
# SB sectors: Act_const(5), Act_serv(6) use all 6 products
# SC sectors: Act_Min(2) uses 4 products (no prod_Agri=1, no prod_const=5)
sa_idx <- c(1,3,4)  # Act_Agri, Act_Manu, Act_elect_agua_gas
sb_idx <- c(5,6)    # Act_const, Act_serv
sc_idx <- 2          # Act_Min
p5_idx <- c(1,2,3,4,6)  # Pno5: Agri, Min, Manu, EAG, serv
pmin_idx <- c(2,3,4,6)   # PMin: Min, Manu, EAG, serv

# Zero out excluded entries
bx[5, sa_idx] <- 0  # prod_const not used by SA
bx[c(1,5), sc_idx] <- 0  # prod_Agri and prod_const not used by SC(Min)
bx <- pmax(bx, 0)
# Floor at 1e-10 for included entries
for (j in sa_idx) bx[p5_idx, j] <- pmax(bx[p5_idx, j], 1e-10)
for (j in sb_idx) bx[, j] <- pmax(bx[, j], 1e-10)
for (j in sc_idx) bx[pmin_idx, j] <- pmax(bx[pmin_idx, j], 1e-10)

# Note: gamma_v and alpha_v will be calibrated correctly later using p_base
omega_val <- 0.5*0+1.5
# Consumed products index (Pcon): exclude prod_Min(2) and prod_const(5)
pcon_idx <- c(1,3,4,6)  # Agri, Manu, EAG, serv
pnc_idx <- c(2,5)  # prod_Min, prod_const (non-consumed)

get_flow_values <- function(vals, name, idx1 = NULL, idx2 = NULL) {
    res <- as.list(as.numeric(vals))
    if (is.null(idx2)) names(res) <- paste0(name, "__", idx1)
    else { grid <- expand.grid(idx1, idx2); names(res) <- paste0(name, "__", grid$Var1, "__", grid$Var2) }
    return(res)
}
```

## 2. Creación del Modelo gEcon

```{r model_gen}
model <- make_model("../script/cge_calib_chile_6_sect.gcn")

# Basic SAM-derived constants
pshdata <- chile_sam["Hogares", "Pres_soc"]

# --- FIX 4: fact_row = 0 because sinmg SAM does NOT route foreign factor income to Hogares ---
fact_row_in_k_data <- 0
fact_row_in_l_data <- 0

# 1. Institutional row sums from SAM (excluding Total column)
INGG_v_sam <- sum(chile_sam["Gobierno", !names(chile_sam) %in% c("Total")])
INGF_v_sam <- sum(chile_sam["Empresas", !names(chile_sam) %in% c("Total")])
BTINC_v_sam <- sum(chile_sam["Hogares", !names(chile_sam) %in% c("Total")])

# 2. Ratios from SAM
fit_val <- as.numeric(chile_sam["Imp_dir", "Empresas"] / (Kf_val + pad_floor))
pit_val <- as.numeric(chile_sam["Imp_dir", "Hogares"] / (BTINC_v_sam + pad_floor))
INC_v_sam <- BTINC_v_sam - chile_sam["Imp_dir", "Hogares"]
por_trgov_val <- chile_sam["Hogares", "Gobierno"] / (INGG_v_sam + pad_floor)
por_tremp_val <- chile_sam["Hogares", "Empresas"] / (INGF_v_sam + pad_floor)
por_tr_f_g_val <- chile_sam["Gobierno", "Empresas"] / (INGF_v_sam + pad_floor)
por_cont_soc_f_val <- chile_sam["Empresas", "Cont_soc"] / (chile_sam["Cont_soc", "Hogares"] + pad_floor)
por_cont_soc_g_val <- chile_sam["Gobierno", "Cont_soc"] / (chile_sam["Cont_soc", "Hogares"] + pad_floor)
por_pres_soc_f_val <- chile_sam["Pres_soc", "Empresas"] / (INGF_v_sam + pad_floor)
por_pres_soc_g_val <- chile_sam["Pres_soc", "Gobierno"] / (INGG_v_sam + pad_floor)
por_cont_h_val <- chile_sam["Cont_soc", "Hogares"] / (INC_v_sam + pad_floor)
por_sav_h_val <- chile_sam["S-I", "Hogares"] / (INC_v_sam + pad_floor)

# 3. Anchored institutional incomes
INGF_v <- INGF_v_sam
INGG_v <- INGG_v_sam
BTINC_v <- BTINC_v_sam
PITAX_v <- as.numeric(chile_sam["Imp_dir", "Hogares"])
FIRMTAX_v <- as.numeric(chile_sam["Imp_dir", "Empresas"])
TREMP_v <- INGF_v * por_tremp_val
TRGOV_v <- INGG_v * por_trgov_val
VAT_sum <- sum(as.numeric(chile_sam["IVA", p_names]))
Arancel_sum <- sum(as.numeric(chile_sam["Arancel", p_names]))
Activity_Tax_sum <- sum(as.numeric(chile_sam["Imp_prod", s_names]))
Imptos_Espec_sum <- sum(as.numeric(chile_sam["Imptos_Espec", colnames(chile_sam) != "Total"]))
Tax_v <- VAT_sum + PITAX_v + FIRMTAX_v + Activity_Tax_sum + Arancel_sum + Imptos_Espec_sum

INC_v <- BTINC_v - PITAX_v

# Savings as exact budget residual (only consumed products in budget)
CS_h_v <- INC_v * por_cont_h_val
# por_sav from budget: sum(D) + SAV + CS = INC
# First pass assuming p=1
por_sav_h_val <- (INC_v - sum(D_v[pcon_idx]) - CS_h_v) / (INC_v + pad_floor)
SAV_h_v <- INC_v * por_sav_h_val
SAVf_v <- INGF_v - TREMP_v - INGF_v * por_pres_soc_f_val - FIRMTAX_v - INGF_v * por_tr_f_g_val
SAVg_v <- INGG_v - (sum(G_m) + (INGG_v * por_trgov_val) + INGG_v * por_pres_soc_g_val)
SAVext_v <- (sum(I_m) + sum(V_m)) - (SAV_h_v + SAVf_v + SAVg_v)

# Diagnostic balance check
cat("--- Diagnostic Balances in R ---\n")
cat(sprintf("Firm Income Balance: %.2f\n", INGF_v - TREMP_v - INGF_v*por_pres_soc_f_val - FIRMTAX_v - INGF_v*por_tr_f_g_val - SAVf_v))
cat(sprintf("Govt Income Balance: %.2f\n", INGG_v - (sum(G_m) + INGG_v*por_trgov_val + INGG_v*por_pres_soc_g_val) - SAVg_v))
hh_spending <- sum(D_v)  # D at purchaser prices, no tax markup
cat(sprintf("HH Budget: INC=%.2f, Spend=%.2f, SAV=%.2f, CS=%.2f, Gap=%.2f\n", 
    INC_v, hh_spending, SAV_h_v, CS_h_v, INC_v - SAV_h_v - CS_h_v - hh_spending))
cat("--------------------------------\n")

# 1. Free parameters
# --- Armington/CET calibration from SAM base (all prices = 1) ---
sigma_q_val <- 2.0    # Armington elasticity of substitution (imports vs domestic)
sigma_t_val <- 2.0    # CET elasticity of transformation (exports vs domestic)
rho_q_val <- (sigma_q_val - 1) / sigma_q_val   # Armington CES exponent
rho_t_val <- (sigma_t_val + 1) / sigma_t_val   # CET exponent

# Total production per product (sum of make_matrix columns => row sums of make_matrix)
Z_v <- as.numeric(colSums(make_matrix))
names(Z_v) <- p_names

# Total domestic final consumption (Hogares only, since Gobierno is separate)
D_v <- D_m


I_v <- I_m
E_v <- E_m
M_v <- M_m

# CET split: DS = Z - E
DS_v <- Z_v - E_v
DS_v <- pmax(DS_v, 1.0)  # safety floor

# With base prices pd=pe=1, CET FOC gives: E/DS = [gamma_e/(1-gamma_e)]^sigma_t
# WAIT: from FOC pe/pd = (gamma_e/(1-gamma_e)) * (E/DS)^(1/sigma_t)
# So gamma_e/(1-gamma_e) = (pe/pd) * (DS/E)^(1/sigma_t)
# At pe=pd=1: ratio = (DS/E)^(1/sigma_t)
cet_ratio <- (DS_v / pmax(E_v, 1e-6))^(1/sigma_t_val)
gamma_e_v <- cet_ratio / (1 + cet_ratio)
# Handle products with zero exports
gamma_e_v <- pmax(pmin(gamma_e_v, 1 - 1e-6), 1e-6)

# CET scale parameter: Z = at * [gamma_e * E^rho_t + (1-gamma_e) * DS^rho_t]^(1/rho_t)
at_v <- Z_v / (gamma_e_v * E_v^rho_t_val + (1 - gamma_e_v) * DS_v^rho_t_val)^(1/rho_t_val)

# Composite import price based on tariffs
pm_base <- 1.0 * (1.0 + tar_r)  # pm = pworldm * exr * (1 + tar_rate)

# Armington: Q = composite domestic absorption
# Armington FOC gives: pm/pd = [delta_m/(1-delta_m)] * (DS/M)^(1/sigma_q)
# => delta_m/(1-delta_m) = (pm/pd) * (M/DS)^(1/sigma_q)
# At pd=1: ratio = pm_base * (M/DS)^(1/sigma_q)
arm_ratio <- pm_base * (M_v / DS_v)^(1/sigma_q_val)
delta_m_v <- arm_ratio / (1 + arm_ratio)
delta_m_v <- pmax(pmin(delta_m_v, 1 - 1e-6), 1e-6)

# Q in base: determined by market clearing Q + tax_physical = TD_Dom
TD_Dom_initial <- as.numeric(D_m + G_m + I_m + V_m + rowSums(X_matrix))
names(TD_Dom_initial) <- p_names
ImpEsp_p_v <- as.numeric(chile_sam["Imptos_Espec", p_names])
# Q = TD_Dom - VAT/p - ImpEsp/p. At p=1: Q = TD_Dom - IVA - ImpEsp
IVA_v <- as.numeric(chile_sam["IVA", p_names])
Ar_v <- as.numeric(chile_sam["Arancel", p_names])
Q_v <- TD_Dom_initial - IVA_v - ImpEsp_p_v

# Armington scale: Q = aq * [delta*M^rho_q + (1-delta)*DS^rho_q]^(1/rho_q)
aq_v <- Q_v / (delta_m_v * M_v^rho_q_val + (1 - delta_m_v) * DS_v^rho_q_val)^(1/rho_q_val)

# Composite price p: p*Q = pd*DS + pm*M. At pd=1:
p_base <- (DS_v + pm_base * M_v) / Q_v

# Producer output price pz: pz*Z = pd*DS + pe*E. At pd=1, pe=1: pz = (DS + E) / Z = 1
pz_base <- (DS_v + E_v) / Z_v

# Re-calibrate household savings based on actual p_base to exactly satisfy budget
pcon_names <- c("prod_Agri", "prod_Manu", "prod_elect_agua_gas", "prod_serv")
por_sav_h_val <- as.numeric((INC_v - sum(D_v[pcon_idx] / p_base[pcon_names] * p_base[pcon_names]) - CS_h_v) / (INC_v + pad_floor))
SAV_h_v <- INC_v * por_sav_h_val

cat("--- Armington/CET Calibration ---\n")
cat(sprintf("sigma_q=%.1f, sigma_t=%.1f, rho_q=%.4f, rho_t=%.4f\n", sigma_q_val, sigma_t_val, rho_q_val, rho_t_val))
cat("gamma_e (CET export share):", round(gamma_e_v, 4), "\n")
cat("delta_m (Armington import share):", round(delta_m_v, 4), "\n")
cat("Q (Armington composite):", round(Q_v, 2), "\n")
cat("DS (domestic sales):", round(DS_v, 2), "\n")
cat("p (composite price base):", round(p_base, 4), "\n")
cat("pz (producer price base):", round(pz_base, 4), "\n")
cat("--------------------------------\n")

# Compute base arrays of physical quantities using base prices
X_phys <- sweep(X_matrix, 1, p_base, "/")
D_phys <- D_v / p_base

# Calibrate alpha_v with D_phys
D_con_phys <- D_phys[pcon_idx]
alpha_v_unsc <- (D_con_phys)^(1/omega_val)
alpha_v <- alpha_v_unsc / (sum(alpha_v_unsc) + pad_floor)
U_val <- (sum(alpha_v * D_con_phys^((omega_val - 1)/omega_val)))^(omega_val/(omega_val - 1))
lambda_val <- U_val / (sum(D_con_phys * p_base[pcon_idx]) + pad_floor)

# Calibration of firm cost shares with correct X_phys
net_rev <- revenue_vals * (1.0 - t_pro_r - t_esp_r)
bk <- K_vals * 1.0 / net_rev
bl <- L_vals * 1.0 / net_rev
bx <- sweep(X_phys, 1, p_base, "*")
bx <- sweep(bx, 2, net_rev, "/")

# Calculate producer activity price (before tax, since V_sector_vals is gross revenue)
make_share <- t(make_matrix / V_sector_vals)
pz_activity_base <- apply(make_share, 2, function(col) sum(col * pz_base))
V_phys <- V_sector_vals / pz_activity_base

# Gamma for CD: each group uses its own product set, and physical quantities X_phys
gamma_v <- numeric(6)
for (i in 1:6) {
    p_set <- if (i %in% sa_idx) p5_idx else if (i %in% sb_idx) 1:6 else pmin_idx
    prod_term <- 1.0
    for (j in p_set) {
        x_val <- max(X_phys[j, i], 1e-8)
        prod_term <- prod_term * (x_val^bx[j, i])
    }
    gamma_v[i] <- V_phys[i] / ( (K_vals[i]^bk[i]) * (L_vals[i]^bl[i]) * prod_term + pad_floor )
}

# --- Labor Market / Wage Curve Calibration ---
u_base_val <- 0.079
l_total_data_val <- sum(L_vals) + chile_sam["row", "Trabajo"]
l_force_data_val <- l_total_data_val / (1 - u_base_val)
phi_val <- 0.1
# w = w_pot * (LD / L_force)^phi. At benchmark w=1, LD=l_total_data => 1 = w_pot * (1-u)^phi
w_pot_calib_val <- (1 - u_base_val)^(-phi_val)

par_flat <- unlist(list(
    omega = omega_val, k_total_data = sum(K_vals) + chile_sam["row", "Capital"], 
    l_total_data = l_total_data_val, 
    l_force_data = l_force_data_val,
    phi = phi_val,
    w_pot_calib = w_pot_calib_val,
    par_k_h = Kh_val / (sum(K_vals) + chile_sam["row", "Capital"] + pad_floor),
    par_k_f = Kf_val / (sum(K_vals) + chile_sam["row", "Capital"] + pad_floor),
    par_k_g = Kg_val / (sum(K_vals) + chile_sam["row", "Capital"] + pad_floor),
    par_l_h = Lh_val / (sum(L_vals) + chile_sam["row", "Trabajo"] + pad_floor),
    par_l_row = chile_sam["row", "Trabajo"] / (sum(L_vals) + chile_sam["row", "Trabajo"] + pad_floor),
    por_cont = por_cont_h_val, por_sav = por_sav_h_val,
    trgov_data = TRGOV_v, por_tremp = por_tremp_val, por_tr_f_g = por_tr_f_g_val,
    por_cont_soc_f = por_cont_soc_f_val, por_cont_soc_g = por_cont_soc_g_val,
    por_pres_soc_f = por_pres_soc_f_val, por_pres_soc_g = por_pres_soc_g_val,
    pit = pit_val, fit = fit_val,
    pshdata = as.numeric(pshdata),
    fact_row_in_k_data = as.numeric(fact_row_in_k_data), 
    fact_row_in_l_data = as.numeric(fact_row_in_l_data),
    SAVg_base = SAVg_v,
    SAVext_base = SAVext_v,
    imptos_espec_data = sum(as.numeric(chile_sam["Imptos_Espec", colnames(chile_sam) != "Total"])),
    x_agri_min_data = X_matrix[1, 2],
    # Armington/CET parameters
    sigma_q = sigma_q_val, sigma_t = sigma_t_val,
    get_flow_values(gamma_e_v[c(1, 2, 3, 6)], "gamma_e", p_names[c(1, 2, 3, 6)]),
    get_flow_values(at_v[c(1, 2, 3, 6)], "at", p_names[c(1, 2, 3, 6)]),
    get_flow_values(delta_m_v, "delta_m", p_names),
    get_flow_values(aq_v, "aq", p_names),
    get_flow_values(D_con_phys, "dst", p_names[pcon_idx]),
    get_flow_values(c(1e-6, 1e-6), "dst_nc", p_names[pnc_idx]),
    get_flow_values(vat_r, "vat", p_names), 
    get_flow_values(tar_r, "tar_rate", p_names), 
    get_flow_values(rep(1, 6), "pworlde", p_names),
    get_flow_values(rep(1, 6), "pworldm", p_names),
    get_flow_values(t_pro_r, "tps", s_names),
    get_flow_values(t_esp_r, "tes", s_names),
    get_flow_values(V_phys, "vst", s_names),
    get_flow_values(G_m / p_base, "gg_market_data_p", p_names),
    get_flow_values(I_m / p_base, "I_data", p_names),
    get_flow_values(V_m / p_base, "vexist", p_names),
    get_flow_values(ImpEsp_p_v, "imptos_espec_p", p_names),
    get_flow_values(make_share, "make_share", p_names, s_names)
))

model <- set_free_par(model, par_flat)

# Calibration parameter guesses (split for SA/SB/SC)
sa_names <- s_names[sa_idx]
sb_names <- s_names[sb_idx]
sc_names <- s_names[sc_idx]
p5_names <- p_names[p5_idx]  # Pno5
pmin_names <- p_names[pmin_idx]  # PMin

calib_par_flat <- unlist(list(
    get_flow_values(alpha_v, "alpha", p_names[pcon_idx]), 
    get_flow_values(gamma_v, "gamma", s_names),
    get_flow_values(bk, "betak", s_names), get_flow_values(bl, "betal", s_names),
    get_flow_values(bx[p5_idx, sa_idx, drop=FALSE], "betax", p5_names, sa_names),
    get_flow_values(bx[, sb_idx, drop=FALSE], "betax", p_names, sb_names),
    get_flow_values(bx[pmin_idx, sc_idx, drop=FALSE], "betax", pmin_names, sc_names)
))
model <- initval_calibr_par(model, calib_par_flat)

# 3. Variable initialization
var_list <- list(
    INGF = INGF_v, INGG = INGG_v,
    FIRMTAX = FIRMTAX_v, PITAX = PITAX_v,
    TREMP = TREMP_v, TRGOV = TRGOV_v, PSh = as.numeric(pshdata),
    INC = INC_v, BTINC = BTINC_v, SAV = SAV_h_v, CS = CS_h_v,
    SAVf = SAVf_v, SAVg = SAVg_v, SAVext = SAVext_v,
    TOTAL_SAV = SAV_h_v + SAVf_v + SAVg_v + SAVext_v,
    inv_adj = 1.0,
    VAT = VAT_sum, Tax = Tax_v, TPROD = Activity_Tax_sum, TESP = Imptos_Espec_sum, TARANCEL = Arancel_sum,
    pk = 1.0, w = 1.0, exr = 1.0, Kh = Kh_val, Lh = Lh_val, Kf = Kf_val, Kg = Kg_val,
    LD = l_total_data_val, u_rate = u_base_val,
    U = U_val, lambda__CONSUMER_1 = lambda_val
)
init_vars <- unlist(list(
    var_list,
    SAVext = SAVext_v,
    get_flow_values(rep(0, 6), "pi", s_names),
    get_flow_values(p_base, "p", p_names),
    get_flow_values(rep(1, 6), "pd", p_names),
    get_flow_values(pz_base, "pz", p_names),
    get_flow_values(rep(1, 6), "pe", p_names),
    get_flow_values(pm_base, "pm", p_names),
    # Trade variables
    get_flow_values(Z_v / pz_base, "Z", p_names),
    get_flow_values(DS_v / rep(1,6), "DS", p_names),
    get_flow_values(E_v / rep(1,6), "EX", p_names),
    get_flow_values(M_v, "M", p_names),
    get_flow_values(Q_v / p_base, "Q", p_names),
    get_flow_values(DS_v / rep(1,6), "DD", p_names),  # DD = DS in equilibrium
    get_flow_values(rep(0, 6), "PI_CET", p_names),  # zero profit in CRS
    get_flow_values(rep(0, 6), "PI_ARM", p_names),  # zero profit in CRS
    # Domestic absorption
    TD_Dom_Agri = as.numeric((TD_Dom_initial / p_base)["prod_Agri"]),
    TD_Dom_Const = as.numeric((TD_Dom_initial / p_base)["prod_const"]),
    get_flow_values(as.numeric((TD_Dom_initial / p_base)[pmin_names]), "TD_Dom_PMin", pmin_names),
    # Consumer demand
    get_flow_values(D_con_phys, "D", p_names[pcon_idx]),
    D__prod_Min = 1e-6, D__prod_const = 1e-6,
    get_flow_values(sweep(make_share, 2, V_phys, "*"), "Yap", p_names, s_names),
    
    # Firm/Sectors Initialization
    get_flow_values(V_phys, "V", s_names),
    get_flow_values(revenue_vals, "revenue", s_names),
    get_flow_values(net_rev, "net_revenue", s_names),
    get_flow_values(K_vals, "K", s_names),
    get_flow_values(L_vals, "L", s_names),
    
    # X matches intermediate nominal values, so X * p = X_matrix
    get_flow_values(X_matrix[p5_idx, sa_idx, drop=FALSE] / p_base[p5_idx], "X", p5_names, sa_names),
    get_flow_values(X_matrix[, sb_idx, drop=FALSE] / p_base, "X", p_names, sb_names),
    get_flow_values(X_matrix[pmin_idx, sc_idx, drop=FALSE] / p_base[pmin_idx], "X", pmin_names, sc_names),
    get_flow_values(IVA_v, "VAT_p", p_names),
    get_flow_values(Ar_v, "Arancel_p", p_names)
))
model <- initval_var(model, init_vars)
```

## 3. Solución de Equilibrio (Calibración)

```{r solution}
# Check initial residuals first
eq_options <- list(method = "Newton", global = "gline", max_iter = 10000, tol = 3.5e-5)
model <- steady_state(model, calibration = TRUE, options_list = eq_options)

# Diagnostics
cat("Norma residuos iniciales:", pracma::Norm(model@init_residual_vector), "\n")
cat("Norma residuos finales:", pracma::Norm(model@residual_vector), "\n")
# Show top 20 worst initial residuals
init_res <- model@init_residual_vector
names(init_res) <- model@variables
sorted_res <- sort(abs(init_res), decreasing = TRUE)
cat("\n--- Top 20 initial residuals ---\n")
print(head(sorted_res, 20))
```

# Estadisticas de residuos
```{r}
get_residuals(model)
pracma::Norm(model@init_residual_vector)
pracma::Norm(model@residual_vector)
```

# Estadisticas de valores obtenidos
```{r}
var_info(model, all = T)
get_par_values(model)
```
